## 2026-05-31 15:51 — Batch #1 (2 videos + 2 stills)

### 1. lucaai-hero-20260531-155151-16x9.mp4
- **Duration**: 12 seconds
- **Format**: 720p, 16:9 (horizontal hero)
- **Style**: Elegant Wes Anderson-style miniature command theater cinematic film
- **Description**: 
  Slow symmetrical camera movement across a perfectly composed miniature laboratory command theater. Tiny glowing agent orbs in sophisticated pastels perform precise, delightful micro-tasks on mechanical miniature sets against deep Admiralty Navy (#0B1F3A) backgrounds with soft ceremonial lighting. Symmetrical wipes and tiny glowing central canvas where complex agent missions are orchestrated with theatrical precision. One orb directs operations, another supervises, another executes — all in beautiful mechanical harmony. Ultra precise alignment, high-end film-set aesthetic, the joy of elegant control. Ends with refined reveal of the LUCA-AI wordmark/logo over the symmetrical stage accompanied by the Portuguese tagline in clean professional typography: "LUCA-AI — Seus agentes em um teatro de comando perfeito." Color palette strictly follows visual bible: Admiralty Navy dominant, Royal Fleet Blue accents, Officer White highlights, sophisticated pastels on agent orbs and cards. Meticulous symmetry, delightful precision, never chaotic or cyberpunk.

### 2. lucaai-reels-20260531-155151-9x16.mp4
- **Duration**: 9 seconds
- **Format**: 720p, 9:16 (vertical — optimized for Instagram Reels / YouTube Shorts / TikTok)
- **Style**: Poetic elegant vertical social motion
- **Description**:
  Intimate symmetrical close-ups of the Wes Anderson miniature diorama command theater. Tiny glowing pastel agent orbs move with mechanical precision across perfectly aligned miniature sets, central canvas lighting up as missions are orchestrated. Delicate wipes and delightful micro-interactions. Large refined Portuguese text overlays in clean professional typography with elegant spacing: "Agentes que trabalham com precisão cinematográfica.", "Um palco perfeito para sua inteligência.", "Controle que você sente no peito.". Final frame holds the LUCA-AI logo/wordmark with the tagline "Seus agentes em um teatro de comando perfeito." Deep Admiralty Navy, sophisticated pastels, Officer White, soft ceremonial lighting. Ultra precise, high-end miniature laboratory aesthetic.

**Notes**:
- All assets adhere strictly to the LUCA-AI visual bible: Wes Anderson symmetry and meticulous composition, miniature diorama command theater, deep Admiralty Navy (#0B1F3A) + Royal Fleet Blue (#1E4E8C) + Officer White (#F8FAFC) + sophisticated pastels, delightful precision and elegant control.
- Typography: clean, slightly playful but professional sans with excellent symmetry and spacing. Portuguese text feels refined and cinematic.
- These marketing videos and stills are designed for sophisticated external positioning: pitch decks, website hero sections, social campaigns, Obsidian/agent community showcases, and any context where "beautiful, precise agent orchestration" needs to be communicated with delight rather than raw power.
- Existing motion assets in `grokassets/motion/` (wes-anderson-diorama-command hero loop and symmetrical-agent-canvas navigation) complement this library for UI and presentation use cases.
